allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\F15-LuanGs\\OneDrive\\Anexos\\Desktop\\Project developer\\Marketing\\lordsburgerhouse"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\'\), '' } | Sort-Object)

Bash(awk '/^   P8\\.|^\\/\\* ── Responsive P8|^\\/\\*.*P8/{section=$0; line=NR} /^\\.hero__bg|^\\.store-closed-banner|^\\.hero__img-col|^\\.hero__layout|^\\.nav-link--auth|^\\.header__logo img/{if \(section\) print NR": " $0 " \(in " section "\)"}' assets/css/style.css)

PowerShell($dir = "c:\\Users\\F15-LuanGs\\OneDrive\\Anexos\\Desktop\\Project developer\\Marketing\\lordsburgerhouse"; Get-ChildItem "$dir\\assets\\css\\" | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}; $s = \(Select-String "@media" "$dir\\assets\\css\\style.css"\).Count; $r = \(Select-String "@media" "$dir\\assets\\css\\responsive.css"\).Count; Write-Host "style.css  @media: $s"; Write-Host "responsive.css @media: $r")
